checks.name: desktop project workspace has no overflow and keeps technical details folded
desktop keeps readable session and conversation columns, hides internal session id and preserves line breaks
edit project modal has stable desktop layout, valid fields and explicit actions
create project modal switches between local directory and GitHub clone sources
ordinary project question renders only the friendly answer without task card or internal work details
explicit implementation request keeps the project task card and delivery progress
mobile project workspace has no overflow and keeps technical details folded
mobile edit project modal becomes a single-column bottom panel without overflow
mobile session list is a working drawer and conversation keeps full width
